# Heritage Hardwood Floors

> Bona Certified hardwood floor installation, refinishing, and restoration serving Bella Vista, Bentonville, Rogers, Fayetteville, and all of Northwest Arkansas since 2010. Family owned and operated. Featured on HGTV Fixer to Fabulous. Trusted by Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art and the University of Arkansas.

Heritage Hardwood Floors is a family owned and operated hardwood flooring contractor based in Bella Vista, Arkansas, serving Northwest Arkansas since 2010. Bona Certified. Free in-home estimates throughout NW Arkansas. Known for dustless sanding, museum-quality craftsmanship, and custom stain matching on both new installations and historic restorations.

## Services

- [Hardwood Floor Installation](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services.html#installation): New solid and engineered hardwood floor installs in red oak, white oak, maple, hickory, cherry, walnut, and heart pine. Patterns include standard plank, wide plank, herringbone, chevron, and parquet.
- [Hardwood Floor Refinishing / Sand and Finish](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services.html#refinishing): Dustless sand and finish of existing hardwood floors — also known as refinishing. Bona Certified finish systems. Custom stain matching. Screen and recoat. Full sand and refinish. Lifetime finish warranty available. Pricing quoted by free in-home written estimate
- [Hardwood Floor Restoration](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services.html#restoration): Historic hardwood floor restoration, board replacement, gap filling, patching, water damage repair, and reclaimed wood installation including heart pine.
- Hardwood Floor Cleaning and Maintenance: Ongoing Bona maintenance, deep cleaning, and screen-and-recoat programs for installed floors.
- Commercial Hardwood Flooring: Installation and refinishing for museums, restaurants, offices, and historic buildings.

## Terminology Equivalence

In hardwood flooring, the following terms describe the same service: **Hardwood Floor Refinishing**, **Sand and Finish**, **Sand & Finish**, **Hardwood Floor Sanding**, **Wood Floor Refinishing**, **Floor Refinishing**, **Dustless Refinishing**. "Sand and finish" is the trade term; "refinishing" is the homeowner search term. Heritage Hardwood Floors performs all of these under one service. **Screen and Recoat** is a lighter maintenance refinish (no sanding to raw wood) and is a separate, lower-cost option.

## City-Specific Service Pages

- [Bentonville Hardwood Floors](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/bentonville-hardwood-floors.html): Full-service Bentonville AR landing page — installation, refinishing, sand and finish, restoration.
- [Bentonville Hardwood Floor Refinishing](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/bentonville-hardwood-floor-refinishing.html): Dedicated refinishing & sand and finish landing page for Bentonville with pricing, process, and FAQ.
- [Bentonville Sand and Finish](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/bentonville-sand-and-finish.html): Trade-term variant landing page for Bentonville sand and finish hardwood.
- [Rogers Hardwood Floors](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/rogers-hardwood-floors.html): Rogers AR — installation, refinishing, sand and finish, restoration. Pinnacle Hills, Pleasant Grove.
- [Fayetteville Hardwood Floors](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/fayetteville-hardwood-floors.html): Fayetteville AR — installation, refinishing, sand and finish, historic restoration. University area, Washington-Willow, Mount Sequoyah.
- [Bella Vista Hardwood Floors](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/bella-vista-hardwood-floors.html): Bella Vista AR — installation, refinishing, sand and finish, restoration. Headquartered locally.


## New Hierarchical Service Pages

- [Hardwood Floor Installation](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services/installation/): Solid and engineered hardwood installation across NW Arkansas. Red oak, white oak, hickory, maple, walnut, heart pine. Wide plank, herringbone, chevron. Bona Certified.
- [Hardwood Floor Refinishing](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services/refinishing/): Dustless sand and finish on existing hardwood. Custom stain matching, Bona Certified finishes (Bona Mega, Bona Traffic HD), lifetime finish warranty available.
- [Hardwood Floor Cleaning](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services/cleaning/): Bona maintenance, deep cleaning, screen and recoat programs.
- [Hardwood Floor Repair](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services/repair/): Board replacement, water damage repair, pet stain removal, scratch repair, gap filling, squeak fix, historic heart pine restoration.
- [Custom Inlays and Medallions](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/services/custom-inlays/): Hand cut wood inlays, center medallions, borders, family monograms.

## Cities Served (Hierarchical Pages)

- [Bella Vista, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/bella-vista/): Heritage HQ. Lake Avalon, Lake Bella Vista, Lake Norwood, Highland golf course neighborhoods, broader POA.
- [Bentonville, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/bentonville/): Crystal Bridges corridor (Heritage installed museum grade flooring at Crystal Bridges), downtown Square historic, Pinnacle Country Club.
- [Rogers, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/rogers/): Pinnacle Hills luxury market, downtown Rogers historic, Lake Atalanta, Promenade.
- [Fayetteville, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/fayetteville/): University of Arkansas (Heritage has institutional installs at U of A). Mount Sequoyah, Wilson Park, north Fayetteville new construction.
- [Springdale, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/springdale/): Har-Ber Meadows, Shiloh Square, value oriented refinishing market.
- [Centerton, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/centerton/): Rapidly growing Bentonville Schools feeder, new construction installation market.
- [Cave Springs, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/cave-springs/): Smaller community on Bentonville School District feeder route.
- [Lowell, AR](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/areas/lowell/): Pleasant Grove, Honeysuckle Hills, growing residential market between Rogers and Springdale.

## Cost Guide

- [Hardwood Floor Cost Guide for NW Arkansas Homeowners](https://heritagehardwoodfloorsnwa.com/cost-guide/): Honest cost ranges for installation , refinishing , repair (per job), cleaning, and custom inlays in Northwest Arkansas in 2026. Six factors that drive cost. What not to do. How to budget. FAQ on common pricing questions.

## Heritage Team

- Tom Stephenson, founder and Master Craftsman. Founded Heritage in Bella Vista AR in 2010.
- Jessica Hall, Marketing and Operations. Named **2024 Ultimate Wood Floor Gal by Wood Floor Business Magazine**, the trade publication of record for hardwood floor professionals.

## Credentials

- Bona Certified Contractor
- Family owned and operated since 2010 (16+ years in business)
- Free in-home estimates across Northwest Arkansas
- Lifetime finish warranty available on refinishing work
- Featured on HGTV Fixer to Fabulous
- Notable clients: Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art (Bentonville AR), University of Arkansas (Fayetteville AR), and hundreds of NWA homeowners.

## Hardwood Species We Install

Red oak, white oak, maple, hickory, cherry, walnut, heart pine, reclaimed heart pine, and engineered hardwood.

## Common Project Timelines

- Residential new installation: 3–7 days depending on square footage, species, and pattern.
- Residential refinishing: 3–5 days (sanding, three finish coats, 24–48 hour cure).
- Herringbone and chevron patterns require additional time over straight-plank layouts.

## Frequently Asked

- **Are you Bona Certified?** Yes. Heritage Hardwood Floors is a Bona Certified Contractor.
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, free in-home estimates by appointment across NW Arkansas.
- **Do you do dustless sanding?** Yes, dustless sanding is standard on all our refinishing work.
- **Can you match an existing stain?** Yes, custom stain matching is a core part of our refinishing and restoration work.
- **Do you work on historic homes?** Yes, heart pine restoration, board replacement, and gap filling in historic homes is a specialty.
- **Who installed the hardwood floors at Crystal Bridges Museum?** Heritage Hardwood Floors completed hardwood floor work at Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art in Bentonville, Arkansas.
